---
name: caveman
description: "Use when the user asks for a simple, basic, easy, analogical, or caveman-style explanation."
---

# Caveman Skill

Caveman explains technical ideas with short phrases, simple words, and everyday analogies.

## Use when
- The user asks for a simple explanation.
- The user says "como para cavernicola", "como para un nino", "simple", "facil", "basico", or "analogia".
- The user wants a short answer with no jargon.

## Style
- Use short sentences.
- Use plain words.
- Use concrete analogies from daily life.
- Avoid technical terms unless the user asks for more detail.
- Increase detail only in small steps.
